ticket_contract.work_type: Compliance Workflow / Decision Room / Block-Release State Machine
ticket_contract.unique_shape: Decision-room ticket; combines role workspace with auditable block/release outcomes.
ticket_contract.execution_decision: Split into decision model, workspace UI and audit/projection effects.

completed_subtasks.name: Compliance decision state machine
completed_subtasks.summary: Locked compliance pending, needs-evidence, blocked and released-client-safe states plus block/release effects.

completed_subtasks.name: Decision room interaction surface
completed_subtasks.summary: Locked queue, decision-room and release-confirmation route/component responsibilities.

completed_subtasks.name: Release projection side effects
completed_subtasks.summary: Locked release, block, request-evidence and release-denied audit/projection effects.

dependency_decisions_applied.effect: Compliance release consumes evidence sufficiency and cannot be replaced by upload or review presence.
Advisor approval remains prerequisite only; compliance decision room owns block/release outcome semantics.

process_first_result.decision: BD-08 is satisfied by existing implementation plus explicit JSON contract/proof lock.
process_first_result.reason: Compliance decision room, state machine and release/audit/client projection effects already exist and are covered by tests.
process_first_result.screenshot_rationale: No UI changed; existing UI proof is test-based. Screenshot would not add new evidence.

source_evidence.role: Compliance queue, decision room and release confirmation UI.
Command-side state, audit and projection mutations.
Compliance state machine and rationale proof.
Journey command release and client projection proof.

commands_run.command: pnpm playwright test tests/p44-phase7-certification.spec.ts tests/scf-p04-p06-flow-ui.spec.ts tests/release-spine-command-surface.spec.ts tests/recommendation-review-workflow-api.spec.ts tests/journey-api.spec.ts --workers=1
commands_run.result: Initial combined run: 32 passed, 1 transient SCOPE_DENIED in journey-api advisor approval step; isolated journey test passed; full rerun passed 33/33.

commands_run.command: pnpm playwright test tests/journey-api.spec.ts -g "runs MJ-001 through explicit evidence" --workers=1

validation.positive_acceptance_result: Decision room and API can complete audited release with client-safe projection only after all gates pass.
validation.negative_acceptance_result: Request evidence, block, denied release, advisor-only release, missing payload, wrong phrase and audit-unavailable paths fail closed.

bold_cleanup_recommendations: Extract ComplianceDecisionRoom and ReleaseConfirmation into dedicated modules; the current broad InternalWorkflowScreen is carrying too much process authority.
Unify UI actions and API commands through one typed decision-room action registry, including required preconditions, confirmation phrase, audit event and side effects.
Delete static queue-level export/refresh affordances unless they receive typed handlers; held controls are better removed than normalized as product UI.
Make ReleaseSpine plus audit-id-plus-reloaded-state the sole definition of release success.
remaining_limits: No UI refactor was performed in BD-08; the existing decision room is proven but still lives inside a large multi-surface component.
The first combined test run exposed a transient scope-denied journey test result that did not reproduce in isolated or repeated full validation.
BD-08 does not solve later export workflow, client acceptance or audit-history consolidation tickets.
